calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The holographic will dated January 28, 2015 is admitted to probate. The San Francisco Public Administration is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority/limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 2, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
